creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for the patch and pointing out the option changes.

Actually the reason I have still not updated this is that this update breaks the asterisk ports, and the breakage shows at runtime.

The only solution I can think of is decoupling asterisk from the pjsip port by making asterisk use the embedded pjsip. At that point updating this port will not be problematic anymore, and maybe I will also be able to get rid of the extsrtp slave port.

I've been procrastinating this change, but I'll try to find time to fix this one soon.
